01   Capabilities

Precision-engineered for those who cannot afford ambiguity.

The Kettering platform integrates seamlessly with your existing security infrastructure — dispatching, observing, and reporting with a level of clarity no traditional system can provide.

I
Autonomous Dispatch

Synchronized to your alarm infrastructure, your DITB deploys the moment an event registers — no human intervention, no delay. It is airborne before you finish reading the alert.

II
Live Intelligence Feed

An encrypted 4K channel opens to your device as the unit reaches the trigger zone. Assess in real time. Escalate to emergency services — or stand down. The decision is yours alone.

III
AI Classification

Onboard inference identifies subjects, vehicles, and behavioral patterns — flagging what matters, filtering what does not. Intelligence, not noise, delivered directly to your attention.

IV
Scheduled Patrols

Define patrol routes and intervals. Your units execute on schedule, logging each circuit and surfacing anomalies in a private daily debrief — behavioral patterns, visitor frequency, flagged events.

02   Dual Dock System

Two units.
Zero gaps.

Every Kettering property installation includes two independent drone-in-the-box units — not as redundancy, but as doctrine. While Unit Alpha responds to a live dispatch, Unit Bravo holds perimeter watch. Your coverage does not pause. Your protection does not blink.

Each unit maintains its own charge cycle, autonomous return-to-dock protocol, and independent communication channel. If one unit is airborne, the other is ready. Always.

Coverage Mode
Simultaneous Dual-Zone
Failover Protocol
Automatic — < 4 sec

Independent, Staggered

03   Dispatch Protocol

From trigger to visual confirmation — under sixty seconds.

The moment your perimeter registers an event, your system responds. The DITB activates, the unit lifts, and your live feed opens. No call center. No delay. No uncertainty.

You are not notified after something happens. You see it as it unfolds — and if a second event triggers simultaneously, Bravo is already lifting.

Unit Alpha
DEPLOYED
Unit Bravo
STANDBY
ETA to Zone

MOTION / PERIMETER
04   Tactical Superiority

Built where others stop.

Kettering was not designed to match the market. It was designed to make the market irrelevant. Three capabilities define our advantage — and no competitor comes close to any of them.

Endurance Advantage

Our DITB platform sustains four times the airborne duration of any comparable system on the market. Where competitors recall and recharge after minutes, your units remain on station — observing, tracking, and reporting without interruption. Endurance is not a specification. It is a strategic asset.

Flight Duration · 4× Industry Standard

Military Thermal Optics

Darkness is not cover. Kettering units carry military-grade thermal imaging that turns night into full visible clarity — detecting heat signatures through foliage, across distance, and in conditions of total blackout. What your other systems cannot see, ours identifies, classifies, and records in real time.

Thermal Imaging · Full-Spectrum · Night Parity

Off-Property Pursuit

When a threat crosses your property line, our units do not stop at the boundary. Kettering maintains autonomous pursuit beyond the perimeter — tracking, documenting, and transmitting every movement in real time. Every turn. Every face. A complete evidentiary record delivered to law enforcement before they arrive on scene.

Pursuit Protocol · No Boundary Limit
06   Intelligence Debrief

Your property, surveilled and understood — on your schedule.

Beyond reactive dispatch, Kettering operates proactively. Scheduled patrol routes survey your perimeter at intervals you define. Each circuit is logged, analyzed, and distilled into a private daily debrief — behavioral patterns, visitor frequency, anomalous vehicles, notable events. Clarity on demand.
